# 10E0 (TenE0)

> Next-generation enterprise application framework on .NET 10 / C# 14.
> Clean Architecture + DDD + CQRS. Self-built dispatcher (no MediatR license risk),
> Outbox pattern, declarative permissions, multi-tenancy, dynamic queries.
> NuGet: `TenE0.Core` · GitHub: https://github.com/vs0533/10e0 · MIT

10E0 is a declarative backend framework: you express permissions, sequences,
import/export columns, scheduled jobs, and state machines as **C# attributes and
fluent APIs** — there is no external YAML DSL. The framework wires up CQRS pipeline
behaviors, EF Core interceptors (audit + soft-delete), and an Outbox relay so a
production-grade service is a few lines of `Program.cs`.

## Start here (read in order)

- [AGENTS.md](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/AGENTS.md): The consumer onboarding guide. Read this first — it has the "add a feature in 6 steps" template, the full attribute cheatsheet, and hard constraints. (~10 min read)
- [Quickstart](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/02-quickstart.md): 5-minute path from `dotnet new` to a running API.
- [Architecture overview](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/01-architecture.md): Layers, pipeline behavior chain, module map.

## Optional (read when relevant)

- [DI setup reference](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/03-di-setup.md): Every `AddTenE0Xxx` extension, or the one-line `AddTenE0All` aggregate.
- [CQRS](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/04-cqrs.md): `ICommand<T>` / `IQuery<T>` / handlers / pipeline behaviors.
- [Entities](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/05-entities.md): `BaseEntity → AuditedEntity → AggregateRoot` hierarchy.
- [EntityService](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/06-entity-service.md): Generic CRUD with uniqueness, field-permissions, M:N.
- [EntityQueryService](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/28-entity-query-service.md): read-side mirror of EntityService — paged/list/get/count with auto-applied Named Query Filters and injection-safe filters.
- [Auth/JWT](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/08-auth-jwt.md): login / refresh / logout, role-version revocation.
- [Permissions](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/09-permissions.md): RBAC + field-level + row-level.
- [Domain events / Outbox](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/10-domain-events.md): transactional outbox + 4 lock providers.
- [Multi-tenancy](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/20-multi-tenancy.md): `IMultiTenantEntity` + Named Query Filter.
- [Workflow](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/21-workflow.md): state machine + approval process fluent API.
- [Import/Export](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/22-import-export.md): ClosedXML Excel + RFC 4180 CSV.
- [Scheduling](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/15-sequences.md): `[Scheduled]` cron jobs + cluster lock.
- [Dynamic queries](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/16-dynamic-queries.md): runtime WHERE/ORDER/paging, injection-safe.
- [Observability](https://github.com/vs0533/10e0/blob/dev/docs/26-observability.md): HealthChecks + Metrics + OpenTelemetry.

## Golden reference (clone this for a new feature)

The demo project is a complete end-to-end feature slice:
`src/10E0.Api/Domain/DemoEntity.cs` + `Handlers/DemoCommands.cs` +
`Handlers/CreateDemoCommandHandler.cs` + `Handlers/PagedDemosQueryHandler.cs` +
`Endpoints/DemoEndpoints.cs`. The write handler uses `IEntityService`, the
read (paging/filter/projection) handler uses `IEntityQueryService`.

## Important

- Primary keys are always `string` (GUID "N" literal). Never `int` or `Guid`.
- Handlers do **not** extend a base class — pure interface + constructor injection.
- Write operations go through `IEntityService`, not raw `dbContext.Add` + `SaveChanges`
  (the latter bypasses audit/permission/uniqueness). Read operations (list/paged/
  detail/count) go through `IEntityQueryService`, which auto-applies soft-delete /
  row-level / tenant Named Query Filters.
- Permission is declared via `[RequirePermission]` on the Command/Query record,
  not hand-checked inside handlers/endpoints.
- JWT `SigningKey` is mandatory and must come from config/env, never hardcoded.
